case_title: AI-YU CHUANG VS. NELSON WILLIAM METKE III

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHUANG, AI-YU AS TO DEFENDANT METKE III, NELSON WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED SEP-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT METKE III, NELSON WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AL-YU CHUANG & DEFENDANT NELSON WILLIAM METKE, III. TAMARA GOLDEN, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUANG, AI-YU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METKE III, NELSON WILLIAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
